perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A large blue mascot with yellow angry eyes and small wings (the Rebellious Fairy) dances and poses for a crowd in an exhibition hall. (2) The mascot interacts with a male staff member in front of a blue booth backdrop labeled 'Achu in Wonderland'. (3) The mascot is seen moving through a dense crowd of attendees who are filming with their phones. (4) A staff member in a black apron wipes the mascot suit's face and talks to it as if encouraging a tired performer. (5) The mascot stands still, then starts waving its wings and runs away quickly through the crowd towards an exit at the end of its shift.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male host shouts 'Pan Ni, Pan Ni!' (Rebellious, Rebellious) and the crowd cheers in response. (2) Background noise of a busy exhibition hall with echoing voices and footsteps. (3) The host speaks into a microphone, explaining that the mascot is 'on strike' and needs applause to continue. (4) Loud, rhythmic clapping from the audience fills the audio track. (5) High-pitched female laughter and chatter are heard as the mascot runs away.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '叛逆叛逆～' (Rebellious, rebellious) - Playful hook. (2) Decorative Text: '跑去跟別人battle??' (Going to battle with others??) - Humorous commentary. (3) Decorative Text: '沒有要輸' (Not going to lose) - Determined tone. (4) Decorative Text: '馬的上班遲到ㄌ' (Damn, late for work) - Grumbling/relatable tone. (5) Functional Text: '太小聲ㄌ' (Too quiet) - Instigating tone. (6) Decorative Text: '好爽' (Feels great) - Satisfied tone. (7) Functional Text: '下班886' (Off work, bye-bye) - Cheerful tone.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male host, 1 person in mascot suit, over 20 audience members in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A male host in casual wear and a black apron; a large, blue, plush mascot character with a 'rebellious' facial expression.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An exhibition hall with various booths, crowd barriers, and large promotional banners for 'Achu in Wonderland' and '阿啾小劇場'.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Interaction -> Climax -> CTA -> Resolution
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote the mascot character 'Achun' (Rebellious Fairy) by highlighting its funny and rebellious persona during a fan event, encouraging audience engagement and showcasing the mascot's unique personality.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The entire video focuses on the mascot character of the '阿啾小劇場' brand and its presence at a specific event.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: The mascot's specific angry eyes and the 'Pan Ni' (Rebellious) chant.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses variety-show style captions and high-energy interaction to build a relatable, quirky brand image for the mascot character.
